nasb.text: Pharaoh called for Moses and Aaron and said, “Go, sacrifice to your God within the land.”

esv.text: Then Pharaoh called Moses and Aaron and said, “Go, sacrifice to your God within the land.”

cnv.text: 法老把摩西和亞倫召了來，對他們說：“你們去，在這地獻祭給你們的　神吧。”

ccb.text: 法老召见摩西和亚伦，对他们说：“你们可以去献祭给你们的上帝，不过要在我的境内举行。”
